g.text: ACUTE RESPIRATORY DISTRESS SYNDROME AFTER RECOVERY FROM NON-HODGHUS LYMPHOMA
ALCOHOL RELATED, DIABETES CIRRHOIS OF LIVER
BLOOD CLOT IN LEG MOVED TO HEART
BUT I THINK IT WAS COMPLICATIONS FROM STROKE
COMPLICATIONS FOLLOWING BROKEN HIP THOUGH HE WAS G
COMPLICATIONS FROM INFECTION & CONGESTIVE HEART FAILURE
COMPLICATIONS OF LATO ONSET DIABETES, KIDNEY FAILURE, DETERIORATION OF BODY
COMPLICATIONS OF STROKES AND HEART ATTACKS
CONGEATSIVE HEART FAILURE FOLLOWING STAPH INFECTIO
CONGESTIVE HEART FAILURE DUE TO CHEMOTHERAPY DESTROY VALVES.
CONGESTIVE HEART FAILURE FAILING KIDNEYS (HE HAD D
DIABETIC COMA- KIDNEY FAILURE- SEPTIC INJECTION
DIED WHILE & SHUNT WAS BEING PUT IN FOR BLOCKAGE.
ENPHYEMA/HEART STOPPED WHILE RESTING, ACTIVE UNTIL THE DAY HE DIED.
GAIN GREEN OF THE BOWLS DUE TO PARKINSONS
GAVE UP ON LIVING AFTER OPEN HEART SURGERY
GSW TO REMOVAL / R SIDE ILIAC ARTERY
HEART - TRIPLE BYPASS OPERATION WAS UNSUCCESSFUL
HEART FAILURE CHF SECONDARY TO CHILDHOOD RHEUMATIC
LUNG ISSUES, WORKED IN COAL MINE
MULTIPLE HEALTH PROBLEMS (DIABETIC) COMA LEAD TO DEATH
MULTIPLE MEDICAL - KIDNEY FAILURE HEART FAILURE DIABETES
MULTIPLE- JUST OLD AGE WORN OUT PARTS
MULTY SYS. FAILURE AFTER A FALL
NO AUTOPSY BUT MOST LIKELY STROKE OR HEART ATTACK
OPEN HEART SURGERY- DIED 3 DAYS LATER
PARACHUTTE COLLAPSED WHEN HE WAS 30' ABOVE GROUND, HE GOT A BRAIN CONTUSION AND KILLED HIMSELF AS A RESULT.
PASSED IN HIS SLEEP WHILE IN A CARE FACILITY RECOVERING FROM A FALL.
PNEUNOMIA IS CAUSE LISTED ON DEATH CERTIFICATE BUT IT WAS PRECEDED BY A SEVERE STROKE AND HE DECLINED FOR 6 MONTHS BEFORE HE GOT PNEMONIA AND DIED.
RENALL FAILURE, CHF HAD CANCEROUS KIDNEY NON-FUNTI
SETHIMSELF OR FIVE SMOKING WHILE INTOXICATED.
SUDDEN CARDIAC DEATH 2ND TO ENLARGED HEART FROM COPO
WAS UNABLE TO RECOVER FROM SURGERY.
WASTING P SUBTOTAL GASTRECTOMY FOR ULCER DISEASE
